refs.description: Reference implementation of heap sort with build-heap and sift-down phases.
Heap sort implementation with explanation, built on a shared MinHeap structure.
libstdc++ heap primitives (__push_heap/__adjust_heap) that std::sort_heap and introsort's heapsort fallback rely on.
Linux kernel's generic sort() uses heapsort for guaranteed O(n log n) worst-case behavior in kernel space.
